_comment: Service registry for the Control Panel. Update whenever a service changes.
_note_local_ports: This machine runs many Docker projects. Ports below are the local dev ports for comcoi-v2 specifically. Production ports are standard (80/443 via Caddy).

services.name: SvelteKit Frontend
services.description: SvelteKit SSR application serving the user interface
services._port_note: 47178 chosen to avoid conflicts with other Docker projects on this dev machine

services.name: FastAPI Backend
services.description: Python FastAPI REST API with business logic and AI services
services._port_note: 47002 chosen to avoid conflicts with other Docker projects on this dev machine

services.name: PostgreSQL + pgvector
services.description: PostgreSQL 16 with pgvector extension for relational data and CoCo RAG embeddings
services._port_note: 47432 chosen to avoid conflicts with other Docker projects on this dev machine

services.name: Caddy Reverse Proxy
services.description: Caddy handles reverse proxy, auto-TLS in production

infrastructure.server_type_description: 2 vCPU, 4 GB RAM, 40 GB SSD — ~€4.35/month (cx22 deprecated Apr 2026)
infrastructure._note: Run provision-hetzner.sh once to create the VM. Then use deploy-demo.sh for all subsequent deploys. Server is running as demo/testing environment.

quick_start._dev_note: docker-compose.override.yml is auto-loaded in dev — adds hot-reload volumes and dev commands. Do NOT use in production deploys.
quick_start.rebuild_frontend: docker compose build frontend && docker compose up -d frontend
quick_start.run_migrations: docker compose exec -w /app -e PYTHONPATH=/app backend alembic upgrade head
